info.description: Production-ready secret management with drift detection and GitOps integration
info.title: Secret Manager API

get.description: Get audit logs with filtering and pagination
Export audit logs as CSV file with same filtering options as list endpoint (max 10,000 rows)
Processes OAuth2 callback, validates state, exchanges code for token, and generates JWT

200.description: Returns JWT token and user info

post.description: Starts OAuth2 authentication flow by generating redirect URL to OAuth2 provider
Logout endpoint for client-side JWT invalidation

get.description: Development-only endpoint that bypasses OAuth2 and directly issues JWT for testing
Get side-by-side comparison of Git and Kubernetes versions for a drift event

post.description: Resolves drift by committing Kubernetes secret version to Git
Mark drift event as resolved without syncing (manual resolution)
Resolves drift by overwriting Kubernetes secret with Git version
Admin endpoint to trigger drift detection across all namespaces

200.description: Drift check results for all namespaces

get.description: Get all namespaces the authenticated user has access to via their groups

post.description: Manually trigger drift detection for all published secrets in a namespace

get.description: Get all drift events for a namespace with filtering and pagination
List all secrets currently deployed in the Kubernetes namespace (metadata only, no values)
Get metadata for a specific Kubernetes secret (keys only, no values)
Get all secrets in a namespace with optional status filter

post.description: Creates a new secret draft in the specified namespace

get.description: Retrieve a specific secret by name from a namespace

put.description: Update secret data. Reverts published/drifted secrets to draft status automatically.

delete.description: Delete a secret from the database. Note: Deleting published secrets may cause drift.

post.description: Encrypts secret with SOPS and commits to Git repository for GitOps sync to Kubernetes
Removes secret from Git repository and reverts status to draft

get.description: Get GitOps synchronization status between Git and Kubernetes via FluxCD

namespace.description: New fields for Phase 17 frontend compatibility

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
